title: Notification under EPS, 1995 for calculation of pensionable salary for members who prefer fresh option for contribution.

(1) इस योजना का संि楹玅 नाम कम榁चारी प犆शन (ik¡pok ik¡pok ik¡pok ik¡pok संशोधन) योजना, 2016 है । (2) ये राजप灴 म犆 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृ牵 होगी । 2. कम榁चारी प犆शन योजना, 1995, के पैरा 11, के उप-पैरा (4) म犆 अ瀈त म犆 आने वाले श瀑द犘 "प瀈灶ह हजार 牱पये 灹ित मास से अिधक वेतन पर" के प玑ात् "और िव獸मान सद瀡य犘 के िलए प犆शन यो榑य वेतन जो उ獀तर वेतन के आधार पर ऐसा नया िवक瀖प चाहते ह犉" श瀑द अंतः瀡थािपत 琈कए जाएंगे । [फा. सं. 15011/4/2016-एस.एस.-2] मनीष कुमार गु玅ा, संयु猴 सिचव 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण :::: कम榁चारी प犆शन योजना, 1995 भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उप-खंड (i) म犆 अिधसूचना सं榐यांक सा.का.िन. 748(अ), तारीख 16 नव瀓बर, 1995 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी और अिधसूचना सं榐यांक सा.का.िन. 603 (अ), तारीख 16.06.2016 獧ारा अंितम संशोधन 琈कया गया । -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF LABOUR AND EMPLOYMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1 st July, 2016 G.S.R. 657(E).— In exercise of powers conferred by section 6A read with sub-section (1) of section 7 of the Employees' Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952 (19 of 1952), the Central Government hereby makes the following Scheme further to amend the Employees’ Pension Scheme, 1995, namely :- 1. (1) This Scheme may be called the Employees' Pension (Fifth Amendment) Scheme, 2016. (2) It shall come into force from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Employees' Pension Scheme, 1995, in paragraph 11, in sub-paragraph (4), after the words “on salary exceeding fifteen thousand rupees per month” occurring at the end, the words “and the pensionable salary for the existing members who prefer such fresh option shall be based on the higher salary”, shall be inserted. [F. No. R-15011/4/2016-SS-II] Manish Kumar Gupta, Jt. Secy. Note:The Employees’ Pension Scheme, 1995 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide notification number G.S.R. 748(E), dated 16th November, 1995 and was lastly amended vide notification number G.S.R. 603(E), dated 16th June, 2016.
